name: BizFinBench.v2: Towards Reliable LLMs in Finance via Real-User Data and Offline/Online Bilingual Evaluation
summary: arXiv:2601.06401v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are becoming increasingly significant in financial applications. Nevertheless, prevailing benchmarks are largely dependent...
description: arXiv:2601.06401v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are becoming increasingly significant in financial applications. Nevertheless, prevailing benchmarks are largely dependent on simulated or generic data, which leads to a significant gap between reported performance and actual efficacy in real-world scenarios. To tackle this challenge, we present BizFinBench.v2, the first...
author: Xin Guo, Rongjunchen Zhang, Guilong Lu, Xuntao Guo, Shuai Jia, Zhi Yang, Liwen Zhang
